description_long: This is a robust men's wristwatch featuring a metallic link bracelet and a round, dark blue dial. The bezel is marked with bold white numerals and a blue accent, giving it a sporty and modern appearance. The dial displays large, luminous hour markers and hands, with a prominent '12' at the top and a date window at the 6 o'clock position. The watch case is made of stainless steel, and the crown is positioned on the right side for time adjustment. The bracelet is composed of interlocking metal links, providing both durability and a classic look. The overall design suggests a high-quality, water-resistant timepiece suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A stainless steel wristwatch with a blue dial, bold numerals, and a metal link bracelet. Features a sporty bezel and a date window at 6 o'clock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue dial, large numerals, luminous hands, and date window.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the case and the curvature of the metal bracelet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the metal bracelet and the side of the case.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the case thickness and bracelet curvature from the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: A shield-shaped logo with text is visible below the 12 o'clock marker on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is dark blue with large, luminous hour markers and hands, a bold '12' at the top, and a date window at 6 o'clock. The bezel features white numerals and a blue accent, giving a sporty look. The style is modern and functional, with no subdials.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of stainless steel, featuring interlocking links for durability and a classic appearance.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second), luminous markers, and a date window at 6 o'clock.
